narrative:
Beavercreek 094 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,513 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
